progressBar.title: New to Flowclass? Follow these steps to build your platform
progressBar.description: Better application flow for students. Increase conversion rate. Automate collection of tuition... Your education business grows with us.
progressBar.orderReminder: Below is the order we recommend you to follow.

siteSettings.domain: Choose a domain for your entire site (which groups all your schools)
siteSettings.country: Confirm your country where you will be teaching and the currency to be used
siteSettings.timezone: Confirm the timezone which students will use for booking.

schoolSettings.domain: Choose a link for your school (which students will use to access your page)
schoolSettings.name: Choose a name for your school
schoolSettings.logo: Upload a logo for your school
schoolSettings.banner: Upload a banner for your school
schoolSettings.description: Write a landing page description with at least 200 characters for your school
schoolSettings.location: Fill in the location of your school
schoolSettings.contact: Fill in the contact information of your school

courseSettings.setPath: Set a link for your course enrollment page
courseSettings.setPrice: Set a price for your course
courseSettings.setSchedule: Set the schedule of the coming month for your course
courseSettings.publishCourse: Publish your course to make it available to the world
courseSettings.description: Write a landing page description with at least 200 characters for your course
courseSettings.addTag: Add a tag to your course (optional)
courseSettings.course-upload-banner: Upload a banner for the course
courseSettings.course-lesson-time: Set up lesson time and tuition
courseSettings.course-fill-sections: Fill in at least 2 sections of the course detail description
courseSettings.class-description: Fill in the class description & price
courseSettings.class-timeslots: Fill in at least 2 timeslots of the class

customFormSettings.useInCourse: Use the custom form on your page

whatsappSettings.twilioApiKey: Enter Twilio API Key & Phone Number
whatsappSettings.automationFlow: Go into automation flow and select the correct courses to send

task.centre-upload-logo: Upload a logo & banner for the site
task.centre-upload-info: Fill in the site location & contact info
task.payment-withdrawal-info: Fill in payment account for withdrawal

classSetup.title: What class types do you need?
classSetup.subtitle: Enabling the right class types ensures your scheduling, enrollment, and payment workflows match how your organization actually runs its classes.

scheduleStep.title: What kind of schedule do your classes follow?

fixed.label: Fixed schedule, the time slot is set by you

flexible.label: Flexible, students can book time slots whenever we have an available time slot

enrollmentStep.title: Can students join at any time, or only at the start of a new phase
enrollmentStep.subtitle: (e.g., a new month or term)?

sameEnd.label: Every student ends the class at the exact same lesson, regardless of when they joined the class
sameEnd.example: (e.g. the class always ends on the last Saturday 3:00 p.m. of the month)

differentEnd.label: Student ends their classes at different lessons, according to when they started joining the class
differentEnd.example: (e.g. the class always ends at the 8th lesson)

resultsStep.title: Here's our suggested class types according to your operations:

regular.name: Regular
regular.description: For fixed-term courses with a set schedule and start/end dates.

recurring.name: Recurring
recurring.description: For ongoing classes students can join anytime, with no end date.

appointment.name: Appointment
appointment.description: For flexible, bookable time slots and private sessions.

workshop.name: Events & Workshops
workshop.description: For one-time events, workshops, and special sessions.

resultsStep.note: 🌻 Even if the event is tomorrow, you can set everything up today and get it up and running. You can always change your class type later.

tourStep.welcome: Welcome to Flowclass. Whether you are a seasoned educator or just starting out, we are for you.
tourStep.welcome2: Flowclass gives you everything you need to create a elegant landing page, bio link, or personal website to market your courses.
tourStep.greeting: In just a few simple steps, you can create a fully functional site, course, and class that will attract students and help you grow your business. Let's get started!
tourStep.domain: First things first, you can create your unique domain, and we have multiple endings to choose from. Having an easy-to-remember domain is very important.
tourStep.changeDomain: You can always change your domain and site name afterwards.
tourStep.schoolName: School name will be displayed on the website header, in the search results, and all emails sent to students. It should be the official name of your education brand.

pricingCalculator.title: Find Your Perfect Plan
pricingCalculator.subtitle: Answer a few questions to get personalized pricing recommendations

studentCount.title: How many students do you have?
options: 1,501 or more

workload.title: How would you describe your team's workload managing day-to-day operations?
options: Light — We have time to focus on growth and teaching
Manageable, but could be better
Heavy — We do lots of manual admin
Exhausting — We're always putting out fires

communication.title: Do parents or students often ask about their class schedules, or payments?
options: Seldom — They can check all info themselves
Occasionally — We answer a few queries
Frequently — We handle the same questions repeatedly
All the time — Our inbox is always full of these questions

parentUpdates.title: How do you currently keep parents updated on student attendance, homework, or class changes?
options: We send manual WhatsApp or email updates
We use a parent portal or app
Students are expected to inform parents themselves
We don't have a structured system

paymentReminders.title: How often do you need to remind parents or students about outstanding payments?
options: Rarely
A few times a month
Almost every week
Every single day

tuitionCollection.title: How do you currently handle collecting tuition or class fees?
options: Fully automated (students pay without reminders)
We send reminders manually sometimes
We need to chase payments every month
It's a constant struggle; we lose money to late payments

attendanceTracking.title: How do you currently track class attendance for your students?
options: Paper attendance sheets
WhatsApp groups
Google Sheets/Excel
Automated QR code or app-based system

makeupLessons.title: How do you handle make-up lessons or students transferring between classes?
options: We have an automated system that lets students/parents reschedule or transfer themselves online
Staff handle all requests manually and update records themselves
We use WhatsApp, email, or phone to coordinate and then update a spreadsheet
It's confusing and sometimes students fall through the cracks

bookingProcess.title: When a student wants to book, reschedule, or cancel a class, what's the process?
options: Students handle everything online themselves
There's a form or system, but we need to intervene sometimes
Mostly manual — lots of messages, tracking, and spreadsheets
Total chaos — it's a daily headache!

multipleLocations.title: Do you have multiple locations or plan to open more?
options: We only have one location
We use separate WhatsApp groups/Excel files for each branch
We have a central system, but it's not ideal
We need a better way to manage multiple branches

staffManagement.title: How do you keep track of your staff and tutors' schedules, payroll, and performance?
options: All automated and visible in one central system
We use Excel or Google Sheets
It's handled manually and is time-consuming
We don't really track this consistently

website.title: Do you have a website that students/parents can use to register, see schedules, or make payments online?
options: Yes, with all these features
Yes, but it's basic or hard to update
No, we only use Facebook/WhatsApp
We don't have a website

support.title: Do you need help setting up your system, migrating data, or building a website for your school/centre?
options: Yes, need full support from start to finish
Some help would be good for the initial setup
Just need technical guidance or documentation
No, we'll handle everything ourselves

regular.title: Do you need Regular Classes?
regular.description: Fixed-term courses with a set schedule and start/end dates. Perfect for traditional academic programs, certification courses, and structured learning paths.
regular.yesDescription: Fixed schedule, all students start and end together
regular.noLabel: No, I don't need Regular Classes

recurring.title: Do you need Recurring Classes?
recurring.description: Ongoing classes where students can join at any time, continuing indefinitely without a set end date. Perfect for memberships and continuous enrollment programs.
recurring.yesDescription: Ongoing classes, students can join anytime
recurring.noLabel: No, I don't need Recurring Classes

appointment.title: Do you need Appointment Booking?
appointment.description: Flexible, private session booking—students can select available time slots for 1-on-1 or small group classes. Ideal for tutoring services and consultation sessions.
appointment.yesDescription: Flexible time slots for private sessions
appointment.noLabel: No, I don't need Appointment Booking

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of education providers who trust Flowclass to manage their institutions

testimonialList.quote: After using Flowclass, it has significantly improved our ability to handle registrations and fee collection. It has reduced a lot of tedious work for us. Now, parents can purchase class packages on their own and make reservations themselves.
testimonialList.name: Jenny To
testimonialList.title: Founder

testimonialList.quote: Students can handle everything themselves. I don't need to spend much time dealing with communication or payment issues.
testimonialList.name: Black Cat
testimonialList.title: Co-founder

testimonialList.quote: Flowclass has been a great help for us. It has made our registration and attendance process much easier. We can now handle everything ourselves and don't need to spend much time dealing with communication or payment issues.
testimonialList.name: May Lee
testimonialList.title: Unit-in-charge
testimonialList.company: Hong Kong Federation of Youth Groups

testimonialList.quote: As the number of students grew, so did our administrative workload. Since adopting Flowclass, online registration and payments have become seamless for parents, and student management and class reminders are now automated.
testimonialList.name: Yuki Luo
testimonialList.title: Founder

testimonialList.quote: Since implementing Flowclass, the process has become much more straightforward. I can easily send registration links to parents, handle tuition fees, issue receipts, and track income all in one place. The user-friendly design is a significant advantage.
testimonialList.name: Judy Yiu
testimonialList.title: Owner

homeDescription.title: Create Home Page Description
homeDescription.description: A compelling school description helps potential students understand what makes your institution unique. This is often the first thing visitors see on your website, so it's crucial to make a great first impression.
steps: Navigate to the School Settings page
Write a detailed description of your school (at least 50 words)
Include information about your teaching philosophy, specialties, and what makes you unique
Add any relevant details about your experience and qualifications
tips: Use clear, engaging language that speaks to your target audience
Include specific details about your teaching methods
Mention any specializations or unique features of your school
Keep it professional but approachable

moreClasses.title: Create More Classes
moreClasses.description: Offering multiple class types allows you to serve different student needs and increase your revenue potential. This shows your school's versatility and professionalism.
steps: Go to Teaching Service > Create Course
Choose a different class type from your existing one
Fill in the basic course information
Set up the class schedule and pricing
Configure any special requirements or prerequisites
tips: Consider offering different skill levels (beginner, intermediate, advanced)
Think about different formats (group classes, private lessons, workshops)
Ensure each class has a clear value proposition
Set appropriate pricing for each class type

courseSettings.title: Customize your Course Settings
courseSettings.description: Detailed course descriptions help students understand exactly what they'll learn and what to expect. This reduces confusion and improves student satisfaction.
steps: Navigate to Teaching Service > Edit Course
Write a comprehensive description (at least 50 words)
tips: Be specific about what students will learn
Include the duration and format of the course
Mention any materials or equipment needed
Set clear expectations for student participation

customFields.title: Custom Fields
customFields.description: Custom information fields allow you to collect specific data from students during registration. This helps you better understand your students and tailor your services.
steps: Go to Settings > Student Information Field
Choose the field type (text, dropdown, checkbox, etc.)
Enter the field label and description
Set whether the field is required or optional
tips: Think about what information would be most useful for your teaching
Keep forms concise to avoid overwhelming students
Use clear, simple language for field labels
Test the form from a student's perspective

customForms.title: Custom Forms
customForms.description: Application forms help you gather important information from potential students and streamline your enrollment process. A well-designed form improves the student experience.
steps: Add the necessary fields for your application
Set up conditional logic if needed
Test the form to ensure it works correctly
tips: Include only essential information to keep forms short
Use clear instructions and helpful placeholder text
Consider the order of fields logically
Test the form thoroughly before going live

coupons.title: Coupons
coupons.description: Coupon codes are a powerful marketing tool that can help attract new students and encourage repeat business. They're especially effective for promotions and special offers.
steps: Choose between percentage or fixed amount discount
Set the discount value and any minimum purchase requirements
Set an expiration date and usage limits
tips: Use clear, memorable coupon codes
Set reasonable expiration dates to create urgency
Consider offering different discounts for different occasions
Track coupon usage to measure effectiveness

onlinePayment.title: Online Payment
onlinePayment.description: Setting up online payments makes it easier for students to pay for classes and reduces administrative work. Stripe Connect provides secure, reliable payment processing.
steps: Provide your business information and bank details
Test the payment system with a small transaction
tips: Ensure all business information is accurate for faster approval
Test payments thoroughly before going live
Keep your Stripe dashboard updated with current information
Consider offering multiple payment methods

trackingAttendance.title: Tracking Attendance
trackingAttendance.description: Attendance tracking helps you monitor student progress and identify patterns. It's essential for maintaining accurate records and ensuring students are getting value from their classes.
steps: Find the lesson you want to mark attendance for
Click on the lesson to open details
Add any notes about the lesson if needed
tips: Mark attendance promptly after each lesson
Use notes to track any special circumstances
Review attendance patterns regularly
Follow up with students who have frequent absences

addingClassToStudents.title: Adding Class to Students
addingClassToStudents.description: Enrolling students in courses is a fundamental part of managing your school. This process ensures students are properly registered and can access their classes.
steps: Find the student you want to enroll
Click on their name to open their profile
Select the appropriate course and class
Set the enrollment date and any special notes
tips: Double-check course and class selection before confirming
Set appropriate enrollment dates
Add notes for any special arrangements
Ensure students are aware of their enrollment

importStudents.title: Import Students
importStudents.description: If you have existing student data in spreadsheets or other systems, importing can save you significant time. This feature helps you migrate data efficiently.
steps: Download the template file to see the required format
Prepare your student data in the correct format
Review the import preview for any errors
Confirm the import to add students to your system
tips: Use the provided template to ensure correct formatting
Check all data for accuracy before importing
Start with a small batch to test the process
Keep a backup of your original data

invoiceCampaign.title: Invoice Campaign
invoiceCampaign.description: Invoice campaigns help you send professional invoices to multiple students at once. This streamlines your billing process and ensures timely payments.
steps: Select the students you want to invoice
Customize the invoice content if needed
Set the due date and payment terms
tips: Use clear, professional invoice templates
Set reasonable due dates for payments
Include all necessary payment information
Follow up on overdue invoices promptly

enterAddress.title: Enter Address
enterAddress.description: Adding your school's address helps students find you and provides important contact information. This is especially important for in-person classes.
steps: Include any relevant landmarks or directions
Verify the address is correct on a map
tips: Include clear directions for students
Mention any parking restrictions or options
Update the address if you move locations
Consider adding a map or directions link

invitingInstructors.title: Inviting Other Instructors
invitingInstructors.description: As your school grows, you may want to add other instructors to help teach classes. This feature allows you to manage multiple teachers efficiently.
steps: Set their permissions and access levels
Add a personal message if desired
tips: Clearly communicate expectations to new instructors
Set appropriate permission levels for each instructor
Provide training on your school's systems
Establish clear communication channels

studentCredits.title: Student Credits
studentCredits.description: A credit system allows students to purchase lessons in advance and use them flexibly. This can improve cash flow and student commitment.
steps: Find "Student Credit System" and enable it
Select a student to manage credits for
Add or deduct credits as needed
Add notes explaining the credit transaction
tips: Set clear policies for credit usage and expiration
Keep detailed records of all credit transactions
Communicate credit policies clearly to students
Consider offering credit purchase incentives

addLocations.title: Add Locations
addLocations.description: Multiple locations allow you to expand your school's reach and serve students in different areas. This is essential for growing your business.
steps: Enter the location name and address
Add contact information for the location
tips: Choose locations that are easily accessible to students
Ensure each location has adequate facilities
Consider the local market and competition
Plan for location-specific marketing

approvalRequests.title: Approval Requests
approvalRequests.description: Managing reschedule requests helps maintain class schedules while accommodating student needs. This feature streamlines the approval process.
steps: Check the reason for the request and new timing
Consider the impact on other students
Notify the student of your decision
tips: Set clear policies for reschedule requests
Consider the impact on other students before approving
Communicate decisions promptly to students
Keep records of all reschedule decisions

automationFlows.title: Automation Flows
automationFlows.description: Automation flows help you streamline repetitive tasks and improve efficiency. They can handle everything from student communications to payment reminders.
steps: Choose the trigger for your automation
Set up the conditions and actions
Test the flow to ensure it works correctly
tips: Start with simple automations and build complexity gradually
Test thoroughly before activating flows
Monitor automation performance regularly
Keep automations updated as your processes change

assignHourlyRate.title: Assign Hourly Rate to Instructor
assignHourlyRate.description: Setting hourly rates for instructors helps you track costs and manage payroll efficiently. This is essential for multi-instructor schools to ensure fair compensation.
steps: Find the instructor you want to set rates for
Click on their profile to open details
Look for the "Hourly Rate" or "Payroll" section
Set any overtime or special rate rules if needed
tips: Set rates based on experience and qualifications
Consider market rates for similar positions
Document rate changes for payroll tracking
Review and update rates regularly
